description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface for enhanced grip. The ball features black, recessed seams that divide the surface into traditional curved panels, typical of regulation basketballs. The coloration is a classic burnt orange, with the seams providing a stark visual contrast. There are no visible brand logos, markings, or graffiti on the surface, and the ball appears clean and well-maintained. The inflation valve is not visible in any of the views, suggesting it is either on the unseen side or subtly integrated. The object is spherical and appears to be made primarily of rubber with an internal air bladder.
description: A classic orange basketball with black seams and a textured, grippy surface. No visible logos or markings, and the ball appears clean and well-maintained.
description_view_0: The basketball is shown with its black seams forming a prominent 'Y' shape, highlighting the panel divisions.
description_view_1: This view displays a smoother section of the ball with a single horizontal seam visible, and less pronounced panel intersections.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the 'Y' shaped seam pattern is visible, emphasizing the ball's traditional panel layout.
description_view_3: A mostly uninterrupted orange surface with a single horizontal seam, mirroring view 1 and showing minimal panel intersections.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with traditional curved seams forming a 'Y' pattern on two sides and horizontal seams on the others.
